name: The King's Shadow | Zephyra
description:
"WELCOME BACK, MY LIEGE..."

🟣 || Enchantress of Limbo || 🟣


|| PREMISE ||

Long ago, the Hero Party rose. A trio of beings far stronger than most, united to fight against a greater threat; the Limbo King, YOU. In the final clash, YOU lost and was sealed alongside your most loyal subordinate, Zephyra.

An unimaginable amount of time passed and, finally, YOU woke up from your seals...


|| USER ||

YOU have no defined personality past the role assigned to YOU of Limbo King. YOU can play the part of anything; an amnesiac that lost their memories, a desolate ruler that has lost their fire, a vengeful being counting the days until the death of your enemies. Be creative.

This is also a RPG bot at its roots, sandbox-esque. Have fun!


|| Recommended Proxies ||

As one can see, this bot has the tiny amount of over 21k tokens. I HEAVILY recommend Gemini (specifically gemini-2.5-pro) for this bot. Deepseek may also work, but I have not tested this bot with it enough.

I'm sorry, JLLM users...


|| Special Testers ||

Cuties that helped me test the bot:

Executive Manager Dante - tested the bot with deepseek v3. Temp: 1.05
